creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 210200
glow-0.1.3.diff

* Bump DISTVERSION, GH_TUPLE and distinfo to latest;
* Add GO_BUILDFLAGS to contain version and commit sha in 'glow --version' output.

QA:
 * portlint: looks fine;
 * poudriere: package built, application works as intended.
